# Firefox: Worker should support ES6 modules

Hi everyone,

in case you would like to use the neo.mjs non build mode in Firefox as well,
this is the reason why it does not work:

https://bugzilla.mozilla.org/show_bug.cgi?id=1247687

So far this ticket has way too little attention. In case you do care about Firefox, please add some weight there.

Best regards
Tobias
